class.name: SpineTransformConstraintPose
class.brief_description: Stores a pose for a transform constraint.
class.description: Stores the current pose values for a transform constraint. Transform constraints adjust bone transforms to match a target bone's transform, with various mix values controlling how much each transform component is affected.

method.name: get_mix_rotate
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained rotation.

method.name: set_mix_rotate
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained rotation.

method.name: get_mix_x
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained translation X.

method.name: set_mix_x
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained translation X.

method.name: get_mix_y
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained translation Y.

method.name: set_mix_y
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained translation Y.

method.name: get_mix_scale_x
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained scale X.

method.name: set_mix_scale_x
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained scale X.

method.name: get_mix_scale_y
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained scale Y.

method.name: set_mix_scale_y
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained scale Y.

method.name: get_mix_shear_y
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained shear Y.

method.name: set_mix_shear_y
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained shear Y.
